title: Gendo Ayanami
wikitext:
[]: Gendo Ayanami?             Quote Post by Shockz » Mon Oct 20, 2008 7:57 am Sup all, new member here, just finished watching Rebuild 1.0 for the first time, and I just wanted to post a theory I had regarding one of the possible backstory changes Rebuild made. (I don't know if it's been said before, but I couldn't find any references to it.) The theory itself is probably pretty obvious from the post title--I think it's probable that Gendo's pre-marriage name in Rebuild was Ayanami, not Rokubungi. Why? Well, the only real source for the theory is the traincar scene right after the battle with Sachiel, with the conversation between Yui and Gendo regarding baby names. After Gendo suggests "Shinji if it's a boy, Rei if it's a girl", Yui slowly repeats both names...saying " Ayanami Shinji" and "Ikari Rei", then correcting herself with "Ayanami Rei". Now, assuming that the conversation is being relayed accurately, the only logical reason (well, based on the information we have) for Yui Ikari to suggest giving her children the family name "Ayanami" would be if, well, that was her husband's name: Gendo Ayanami. Now, if I'm right, this fits in with the newbie-friendly approach Gainax is supposedly taking with Rebuild--as soon as new viewers hear Gendo's original family name in whichever one of the sequels it pops up in, the relationship between him and Rei will make start making sense quite a bit more quickly. On the other hand, though, it might seem suspicious to anyone who knew Gendo's original name. (Gendo being Gendo, though, he may have just had all references to it wiped from existence.) What say you all?[/i]

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 20, 2008 7:59 am IIRC, it's actually Rei who says "Ayanami Shinji" and "Ikari Rei." I guess the implication is the same though, regardless of who said. Yeah, I think it's very likely that Webuild Gendou's surname is Ayanami.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 20, 2008 8:10 am It's Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 20, 2008 11:13 am its yui speaking not Rei. its the same voice actress

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Oct 20, 2008 11:21 am Axell wrote: its yui speaking not Rei. its the same voice actress

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Mon Oct 20, 2008 11:37 am It's both of them actually. It's Yui speaking at first, but everything after the giggle is clearly Rei. You can hear it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 20, 2008 12:48 pm Erm, no. Yui is speaking during the names bit, Rei doesn't have any lines in that sequence at all. That would be sort of lame if Gendo has a different last name. I prefer Rokubungi if his "new" last name is Ayanami.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Mon Oct 20, 2008 1:26 pm Erm, yes. Really. Just go back and listen to the scene, just one more time... Closely. Yui calls out the names once, just once. And then a different, younger and much colder voice takes over. That's Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Oct 20, 2008 1:53 pm Rodeo, Rei NEVER talks during that scene, it is Yui and Gendo, contemplating on what to call their unborn child.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 20, 2008 2:07 pm Also, the script is included with the LE DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:16 pm Damn, it seems I've been betrayed by Reichu. She quoted the relevant portion of the script on THAT BOARD, and the lines were allotted to Rei. I'm very confused.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:24 pm Ornette wrote: Also, the script is included with the LE DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:31 pm Vindicated!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:48 pm Rei said it?! WAT

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Oct 20, 2008 4:16 pm I don't see how that's so surprising, regarding Alien-Rei floating up a second later. I also found that scene very reminiscing of her "who are you/am I?" bits in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Shockz » Mon Oct 20, 2008 4:53 pm JimmyWolk wrote: Ornette wrote: Also, the script is included with the LE DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Oct 20, 2008 5:16 pm No....I've been betrayed!

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Oct 20, 2008 5:31 pm Shockz wrote: Not only the conversation itself, but the fact that Shinji's apparently hearing it in his dreams...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 20, 2008 6:19 pm JimmyWolk wrote: regarding Alien-Rei floating up a second later

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Oct 20, 2008 7:10 pm Perhaps the whole repeating of names is supposed to show that Rei and Shinji are connected (which we all know they are).
